description_long: This is a single-car garage structure with a pitched, gabled roof covered in gray slate tiles, showing some weathering and discoloration. The exterior walls are constructed from reddish-brown brickwork, giving it a sturdy and traditional appearance. The front features a wooden sectional garage door with horizontal slats, flanked by a security camera and a wall-mounted light fixture above the door. The sides and rear of the garage are solid brick with no windows or additional doors, and another security camera is mounted on one side. The roof has a vent or small chimney protruding near the ridge, adding to its functional details. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for suburban or urban residential settings.
description: A brick single-car garage with a pitched slate roof, wooden sectional door, and security features. The structure is solid and traditional, with no windows and minimal decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden sectional garage door, wall-mounted light, and a security camera on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid brick wall, roof slope, and a security camera mounted near the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain brick wall and the pitched roof, no doors or windows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid brick wall and a roof vent visible near the ridge.
